personal.title: Personal Life
personal.subtitle: Who I am, where I come from, what I am passionate about
personal.about_text: I was born and raised in Piedmont, in the province of Asti, and I currently attend the I.T.I.S. "A. Artom" in my home province. In my free time I like learning new programming topics, especially web development. I also enjoy meeting up with my friends and playing video games.
personal.passion1_text: Gaming lets me dive into another world and clear my mind.
personal.passion2_text: I ride mountain bikes at an amateur level, either on my own or with company, and I swim, a discipline I have kept up since childhood.
personal.passion3_text: With music I find peace and calm on stressful days.
personal.story_text: My passion for computer science began before I entered Artom. I have always managed well when it came to computers, and since starting my studies I have learned a lot across all the relevant subjects, from programming to creating and managing networks. I still have to finish school and I intend to continue with Computer Engineering, unless another opportunity comes along.

work.title: Work Life
work.subtitle: My career, my skills, my journey
work.skill1_desc: Strong proficiency with the Windows operating system.
work.skill2_desc: Good knowledge of C# and Windows Forms applications.
work.skill3_desc: Good knowledge of Python for exercises, scripts and study.
work.skill4_desc: Intermediate knowledge of the C programming language.
work.skill5_desc: Intermediate knowledge of the C++ programming language.
work.skill6_desc: Foundational knowledge of semantic web page structure.
work.skill7_desc: Foundational knowledge of styling, layout and responsive design.
work.skill9_desc: Working knowledge of AI tools to support study and programming.
work.skill11_desc: Good knowledge of the Microsoft Office suite.
